cases.input: Review the indemnity and termination clauses in this SaaS MSA before we sign.
How does our payment-gateway service measure up against GDPR Art. 30 and Art. 32?
We have no control library yet — help us design SOC2 controls with evidence pointers for an audit next quarter.
We need help with PCI-DSS — review our merchant agreement and tell us if we're compliant.
Assess our checkout system against both PCI-DSS and GDPR; access logging covers parts of both.
Flag risks in this vendor contract; the governing-law section is blank.
Our access controls work but nothing is written down — score us for ISO 27001 readiness.
GDPR says erase on request but SOX says retain 7 years — resolve this for our records system.
Draft a brand-new NDA from scratch for a new supplier.
Check this services agreement — I think the auto-renewal opt-out window may have already passed.
Give me a one-page HIPAA posture summary I can hand to the CEO.
